cfg_statements.code: if capacity <= 0: raise ValueError("capacity must be positive")
if not od and self.min_freq == freq: self.min_freq += 1
if key not in self.key_map: return None
if key in self.key_map: # update value and freq _, freq = self.key_map[key] self.key_map[key] = (value, freq) self._update_freq(key) return

if self.size >= self.capacity: # evict least frequently used, then least recently used among them od = self.freq_map[self.min_freq] evict_key, _ = od.popitem(last=False) self.key_map.pop(evict_key) self.size -= 1
